metric.purpose: Current moisture percentage in the gauge section. The single largest text element.

label.purpose: Section headers like 'Predicted Trajectory', 'Controls', 'Schedule'. Quiet signposts.

body.purpose: Info rows, schedule rows, history entries, control labels.

small.purpose: Chip text, legend items, prediction notes, axis labels.

shadows.name: tile-hover
shadows.purpose: Subtle primary-tinted lift when hovering over a zone tile.

shadows.name: gauge-marker
shadows.purpose: Current-moisture dot on the gauge track.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (bar fills, border color, background).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/focus transitions on tiles, toggles, buttons.

motion.name: pulse-animation
motion.purpose: Active watering indicator ring. Degrades to static 0.5 opacity under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Zone Tile
components.description: Interactive tile in the overview grid. Shows zone icon, name, moisture bar, and stats.
components.css: .ds-zone-tile { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 16px 12px 12px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); background: #fff; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; color: inherit; text-align: center; } .ds-zone-tile:hover { border-color: #03a9f4; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(3, 169, 244, 0.12); } .ds-zone-tile:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #03a9f4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-tile-icon { font-size: 28px; } .ds-tile-name { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-tile-bar-track { width: 100%; height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.12); position: relative; } .ds-tile-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: #03a9f4; transition: width 0.4s ease; } .ds-tile-stats { display: flex; gap: 3px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); } .ds-tile-moisture { font-weight: 600; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Status chip used in info rows for greenhouse state, rain protection, temperature.
components.html: Rain protectedOpen to rain
components.css: .ds-chip { font-size: 0.72rem; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); } .ds-chip-on { color: #03a9f4; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Toggle Button
components.description: Small toggle for on/off controls like auto-target and schedule enable.
components.css: .ds-toggle { border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); border-radius: 12px; padding: 2px 10px; font-size: 0.72rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; font-family: inherit; } .ds-toggle:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #03a9f4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-toggle-on { background: #03a9f4; color: #fff; border-color: #03a9f4; }

components.name: Confidence Badge
components.description: Inline badge showing model confidence percentage.
components.css: .ds-confidence-badge { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 8px; background: #03a9f4; color: #fff; }

components.name: Decision Banner
components.description: Full-width banner showing the model's irrigation decision (water or skip) with reason.
components.html: WaterMoisture below target, no rain forecast
components.css: .ds-decision-banner { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.85rem; } .ds-decision-water { background: rgba(3, 169, 244, 0.08); } .ds-decision-skip { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-decision-label { font-weight: 600; text-transform: capitalize; } .ds-decision-reason { color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); font-size: 0.8rem; }

components.name: Back Button
components.description: Circular back navigation button in the detail view header.
components.css: .ds-back-btn { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); padding: 4px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; font-size: 16px; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-back-btn:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-back-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #03a9f4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Compact metric display within the moisture section showing target, band, deficit values.
components.css: .ds-metric { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; flex: 1; min-width: 70px; padding: 8px 6px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); border-radius: 8px; } .ds-metric-value { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-metric-label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); }

narrative.overview:
This system renders soil-water-balance data as a confident, readable instrument panel. It inherits Home Assistant's visual vocabulary completely -- ha-card containers, CSS custom properties for theming, MDI icon set, standard interactive patterns -- and layers a domain-specific information hierarchy on top. The personality is scientific without being clinical: every data readout earns its space, every control conveys what the model is doing and why.

The system explicitly rejects generic IoT dashboards with oversized colorful gauges, decorative 'smart garden' apps with leaf animations and cartoon imagery, dense spreadsheet tables with no visual hierarchy, and default HA entity lists with no grouping or context. It is not playful. It is not flashy. It is the calm readout of a system that understands your soil.
keyCharacteristics: Theme-native: all colors reference HA CSS custom properties, adapting automatically to any user theme and dark/light mode
Progressive disclosure: overview tile grid answers 'is everything OK?' in under 2 seconds; detail is one tap away, never forced
Data-dense but uncluttered: every number shown helps the user make a decision or build confidence; no decorative metrics
Semantic color only: color is reserved for state communication (active/watering, error, success), never decoration
Responsive within ha-card: adapts to card widths from narrow mobile columns to wide desktop panels via CSS grid auto-fit

rules.name: The Inheritance Rule
rules.body: No color is hardcoded except fallback values. Every color token references a HA CSS custom property.

rules.name: The No-Import Rule
rules.body: The card never imports external fonts. It inherits from HA's cascade.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, active).

dos: Do use HA CSS custom properties for every color value; hardcode only as fallbacks.
Do inherit typography from HA's cascade; express hierarchy through weight and size alone.
Do use ha-icon with MDI icon set for all icons; never inline raw SVGs for UI chrome.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce for every animation.
Do add :focus-visible outlines on all interactive elements for keyboard navigation.
Do use semantic color for state: primary for active/selected, error for critical/negative, success for peak/positive.
Do keep the overview answerable in under 2 seconds.
Do use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums for any numeric column.
donts: Don't import external fonts or override font-family on any element.
Don't use large colorful gauges, circular meters, or toy-like iconography.
Don't add leaf animations, plant graphics, or cartoon nature imagery.
Don't present raw entity lists without grouping, hierarchy, or context.
Don't use border-left/right stripes greater than 1px as colored accents.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) anywhere.
Don't hardcode light or dark theme values; always reference CSS custom properties.
Don't use decorative motion or choreographed entrances; motion is for state feedback only.
Don't add shadows to resting surfaces; only hover and active states earn elevation.
Don't use z-index values above 10 within the card.
